metadata.description: Utah 2026 antlerless elk hunt opportunities dataset built from the official DWR hunt planner boundary table and 2025 DWR remaining permits season labels.
metadata.notes: Antlerless elk permits prioritized for planning, including private-land-only antlerless elk and the antlerless elk-control permit. Season labels are carried forward from 2025 until updated 2026 field regulations are published.
assumptionNotes: General-season antlerless elk rows are labeled General Season for planner filter clarity.
Private-lands-only antlerless elk rows are labeled Private Land Only for planner filter clarity.
General-season antlerless elk rows were refreshed from the General Season Antlerless Elk worksheet.
Private-lands-only antlerless elk rows were refreshed from the Private Lands Antlerless Elk worksheet.
General-season antlerless elk boundary IDs were matched conservatively where unit names aligned clearly to the official statewide boundary layer.
Remaining one-to-one general-season antlerless elk boundary IDs were confirmed from the official Utah hunt table endpoint.

records.title: Antlerless elk-control
records.weapon: Same weapon type as qualifying permit
records.sourceGuide: 2025 Utah DWR remaining permits page and official DWR hunt planner boundary table (used provisionally for 2026 until updated field regs are published)
records.sourcePage: DWR remaining permits + hunt planner boundary table
